'''三貴子'''（'''さんきし'''）とは'''記紀神話'''で'''黄泉の国'''から帰ってきた'''イザナギ'''が黄泉の汚れを落としたときに生まれ落ちた三柱の神々のことである。

revision.comment: 内部リンク設置、+ {{要ページ番号|date=2017年9月}}
典拠不明箇所に要出典タグを付加
出典のない定説と異なる個人的意見または見解であったため
日本書紀の記述を追加
「君が代」の出典は志賀海神社山誉祭神楽歌→古今和歌集→薩摩琵琶『蓬莱山』→明治期に国歌に制定。という流れであるため、大元の神楽歌を考えて、根拠のない記述であったため削除。

revision.comment: Running a split because mass replace regex is the purpose of this category
removing the accumulated cruft that makes [[Special:ShortPages]] useless
revision.text:
'''Three Noble Children''' (三貴子, Mihashira no Uzu no Miko, Sankishi) refers to the three deities born last when {{ill|Izanagi|ja|イザナギ}}, returning from the {{ill|Yomi|ja|黄泉}}, purified himself through a ritual bath (禊, Misogi) to cleanse the impurities of the underworld. These three deities are described in the ''{{ill|Kojiki|ja|古事記}}''<ref name="Y">[[Tobe Tamio]] 『八百万の神々 日本の神霊たちのプロフィール』 [[Shinkigensha]], p.12.</ref>. The name originates from Izanagi himself proclaiming these deities as the most noble among the gods he had begotten. They are also called the '''Three Noble Gods''' (三貴神, Sankishin)<ref name="Y" />.
* {{ill|Amaterasu Ōmikami|ja|天照大神}} – A goddess born from Izanagi’s left eye (though some theories suggest she was originally a male deity<ref>Shōnensha, Gotō Zen, Watanabe Hiroyuki, Hanejōda Masahiko 『神道の本 八百万の神々がつどう秘教的祭祀の世界』 [[Gakken Holdings|Gakken]], pp.56-57.</ref>). She is the {{ill|Solar deity|ja|太陽神}}. * {{ill|Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|ja|月読命}} – A deity born from Izanagi’s right eye. Although the text does not specify gender, he is generally considered a male deity. He governs the night as the {{ill|Moon god|ja|月神}}. * {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|スサノオ}} – A male deity born from Izanagi’s nose. He is the {{ill|Sea deity|ja|海神}}, ruling over the oceans.
The ''{{ill|Nihon Shoki|ja|日本書紀}}'' states in its main text that Izanagi and {{ill|Izanami|ja|伊邪那美}} declared, "How can we not give birth to the rulers of the heavens and earth?" and thus they begot four deities, among whom these three are included. Additionally, it notes that after the Moon God but before Susanoo, they also gave birth to {{ill|Hiruko|ja|ヒルコ}}.
== References == {{Reflist}}
{{Japanese mythology}} {{Shinto horizontal}} {{Shinto stub}}
[[ja:三貴子]]
[[sn:Three Noble Children]] [[en:Three Noble Children]] [[en:Three Noble Children]][[Category:Pages to be written 2]] [[Category:Pages to be written 2]]

'''Three Noble Children''' (三貴子, Mihashira no Uzu no Miko, Sankishi) refers to the three deities born last when {{ill|Izanagi|ja|イザナギ}}, returning from the {{ill|Yomi|ja|黄泉}}, purified himself through a ritual bath (禊, Misogi) to cleanse the impurities of the underworld. These three deities are described in the ''{{ill|Kojiki|ja|古事記}}''<ref name="Y">[[Tobe Tamio]] 『八百万の神々 日本の神霊たちのプロフィール』 [[Shinkigensha]], p.12.</ref>. The name originates from Izanagi himself proclaiming these deities as the most noble among the gods he had begotten. They are also called the '''Three Noble Gods''' (三貴神, Sankishin)<ref name="Y" />.
* {{ill|Amaterasu Ōmikami|ja|天照大神}} – A goddess born from Izanagi’s left eye (though some theories suggest she was originally a male deity<ref>Shōnensha, Gotō Zen, Watanabe Hiroyuki, Hanejōda Masahiko 『神道の本 八百万の神々がつどう秘教的祭祀の世界』 [[Gakken Holdings|Gakken]], pp.56-57.</ref>). She is the {{ill|Solar deity|ja|太陽神}}. * {{ill|Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|ja|月読命}} – A deity born from Izanagi’s right eye. Although the text does not specify gender, he is generally considered a male deity. He governs the night as the {{ill|Moon god|ja|月神}}. * {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|スサノオ}} – A male deity born from Izanagi’s nose. He is the {{ill|Sea deity|ja|海神}}, ruling over the oceans.
The ''{{ill|Nihon Shoki|ja|日本書紀}}'' states in its main text that Izanagi and {{ill|Izanami|ja|伊邪那美}} declared, "How can we not give birth to the rulers of the heavens and earth?" and thus they begot four deities, among whom these three are included. Additionally, it notes that after the Moon God but before Susanoo, they also gave birth to {{ill|Hiruko|ja|ヒルコ}}.

[[ja:三貴子]]
[[sn:Three Noble Children]] [[en:Three Noble Children]] [[en:Three Noble Children]]

'''Three Noble Children''' (三貴子, Mihashira no Uzu no Miko, Sankishi) refers to the three deities born last when {{ill|Izanagi|ja|イザナギ}}, returning from the {{ill|Yomi|ja|黄泉}}, purified himself through a ritual bath (禊, Misogi) to cleanse the impurities of the underworld. These three deities are described in the ''{{ill|Kojiki|ja|古事記}}''<ref name="Y">[[Tobe Tamio]] 『八百万の神々 日本の神霊たちのプロフィール』 [[Shinkigensha]], p.12.</ref>. The name originates from Izanagi himself proclaiming these deities as the most noble among the gods he had begotten. They are also called the '''Three Noble Gods''' (三貴神, Sankishin)<ref name="Y" />.
* {{ill|Amaterasu Ōmikami|ja|天照大神}} – A goddess born from Izanagi’s left eye (though some theories suggest she was originally a male deity<ref>Shōnensha, Gotō Zen, Watanabe Hiroyuki, Hanejōda Masahiko 『神道の本 八百万の神々がつどう秘教的祭祀の世界』 [[Gakken Holdings|Gakken]], pp.56-57.</ref>). She is the {{ill|Solar deity|ja|太陽神}}. * {{ill|Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|ja|月読命}} – A deity born from Izanagi’s right eye. Although the text does not specify gender, he is generally considered a male deity. He governs the night as the {{ill|Moon god|ja|月神}}. * {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|スサノオ}} – A male deity born from Izanagi’s nose. He is the {{ill|Sea deity|ja|海神}}, ruling over the oceans.
The ''{{ill|Nihon Shoki|ja|日本書紀}}'' states in its main text that Izanagi and {{ill|Izanami|ja|伊邪那美}} declared, "How can we not give birth to the rulers of the heavens and earth?" and thus they begot four deities, among whom these three are included. Additionally, it notes that after the Moon God but before Susanoo, they also gave birth to {{ill|Hiruko|ja|ヒルコ}}.

'''Three Noble Children''' (三貴子, Mihashira no Uzu no Miko, Sankishi) refers to the three deities born last when [[:en:Izanagi|Izanagi]], returning from the [[:en:Yomi|Yomi]], purified himself through a ritual bath (禊, Misogi) to cleanse the impurities of the underworld. These three deities are described in the ''[[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]]''<ref name="Y">[[Tobe Tamio]] 『八百万の神々 日本の神霊たちのプロフィール』 [[Shinkigensha]], p.12.</ref>. The name originates from Izanagi himself proclaiming these deities as the most noble among the gods he had begotten. They are also called the '''Three Noble Gods''' (三貴神, Sankishin)<ref name="Y" />.

* [[:en:Amaterasu|Amaterasu Ōmikami]] – A goddess born from Izanagi’s left eye (though some theories suggest she was originally a male deity<ref>Shōnensha, Gotō Zen, Watanabe Hiroyuki, Hanejōda Masahiko 『神道の本 八百万の神々がつどう秘教的祭祀の世界』 [[Gakken Holdings|Gakken]], pp.56-57.</ref>). She is the [[:en:Solar deity|Solar deity]].
* {{ill|Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|ja|月読命|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ツクヨミ}} – A deity born from Izanagi’s right eye. Although the text does not specify gender, he is generally considered a male deity. He governs the night as the [[:en:Lunar deity|Moon god]].
* [[:en:Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo-no-Mikoto]] – A male deity born from Izanagi’s nose. He is the {{ill|Sea deity|ja|海神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sea deity|qq=|1=water deity|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1916821}}, ruling over the oceans.

The ''[[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]]'' states in its main text that Izanagi and {{ill|Izanami|ja|伊邪那美|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izanami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to イザナミ|1=Izanami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q682306}} declared, "How can we not give birth to the rulers of the heavens and earth?" and thus they begot four deities, among whom these three are included. Additionally, it notes that after the Moon God but before Susanoo, they also gave birth to {{ill|Hiruko|ja|ヒルコ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruko|qq=|1=Hiruko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1067028}}.

These three deities are described in the ''[[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]]''<ref name="Y">[[Tobe Tamio]] 『八百万の神々 日本の神霊たちのプロフィール』 [[Shinkigensha]], p.12.</ref>. The name originates from Izanagi himself proclaiming these deities as the most noble among the gods he had begotten. They are also called the '''Three Noble Gods''' (三貴神, Sankishin)<ref name="Y" />.

* [[:en:Amaterasu|Amaterasu Ōmikami]] – A goddess born from Izanagi’s left eye (though some theories suggest she was originally a male deity<ref>Shōnensha, Gotō Zen, Watanabe Hiroyuki, Hanejōda Masahiko 『神道の本 八百万の神々がつどう秘教的祭祀の世界』 [[Gakken Holdings|Gakken]], pp.56-57.</ref>). She is the [[:en:Solar deity|Solar deity]].
* {{ill|Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|ja|月読命|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ツクヨミ}} – A deity born from Izanagi’s right eye. Although the text does not specify gender, he is generally considered a male deity. He governs the night as the [[:en:Lunar deity|Moon god]].
* [[:en:Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo-no-Mikoto]] – A male deity born from Izanagi’s nose. He is the {{ill|Sea deity|ja|海神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sea deity|1=water deity|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1916821}}, ruling over the oceans.

The ''[[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]]'' states in its main text that Izanagi and {{ill|Izanami|ja|伊邪那美|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izanami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to イザナミ|1=Izanami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q682306}} declared, "How can we not give birth to the rulers of the heavens and earth?" and thus they begot four deities, among whom these three are included. Additionally, it notes that after the Moon God but before Susanoo, they also gave birth to {{ill|Hiruko|ja|ヒルコ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruko|1=Hiruko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1067028}}.

* [[:en:Amaterasu|Amaterasu Ōmikami]] – A goddess born from Izanagi’s left eye (though some theories suggest she was originally a male deity<ref>Shōnensha, Gotō Zen, Watanabe Hiroyuki, Hanejōda Masahiko 『神道の本 八百万の神々がつどう秘教的祭祀の世界』 [[Gakken Holdings|Gakken]], pp.56-57.</ref>). She is the [[:en:Solar deity|Solar deity]].
* {{ill|Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|ja|月読命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ツクヨミ}} – A deity born from Izanagi’s right eye. Although the text does not specify gender, he is generally considered a male deity. He governs the night as the [[:en:Lunar deity|Moon god]].
* [[:en:Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo-no-Mikoto]] – A male deity born from Izanagi’s nose. He is the {{ill|Sea deity|ja|海神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sea deity|1=water deity|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1916821}}, ruling over the oceans.

The ''[[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]]'' states in its main text that Izanagi and {{ill|Izanami|ja|伊邪那美|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izanami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to イザナミ|1=Izanami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q682306}} declared, "How can we not give birth to the rulers of the heavens and earth?" and thus they begot four deities, among whom these three are included. Additionally, it notes that after the Moon God but before Susanoo, they also gave birth to {{ill|Hiruko|ja|ヒルコ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruko|1=Hiruko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1067028}}.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Three Noble Children]][[ja:三貴子]][[ko:삼귀자]][[pl:Troje Szlachetnych Dzieci]][[ru:Михасира-но-удзу-но мико]][[vi:Mikiko]][[zh-yue:三貴子]][[zh:三貴子]] {{Infobox deity|parents={{ill|Izanagi|WD=Q813858}} |associated_deities ={{ill|Amaterasu|WD=Q455602}}; {{ill|Susanoo|WD=Q272993}}; {{ill|Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|WD=Q595520}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[da:d:Q4702904]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:57, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Three Noble Children''' (三貴子, Mihashira no Uzu no Miko, Sankishi) refers to the three deities born last when [[:en:Izanagi|Izanagi]], returning from the [[:en:Yomi|Yomi]], purified himself through a ritual bath (禊, Misogi) to cleanse the impurities of the underworld. These three deities are described in the ''[[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]]''<ref name="Y">[[Tobe Tamio]] 『八百万の神々 日本の神霊たちのプロフィール』 [[Shinkigensha]], p.12.</ref>. The name originates from Izanagi himself proclaiming these deities as the most noble among the gods he had begotten. They are also called the '''Three Noble Gods''' (三貴神, Sankishin)<ref name="Y" />.
* [[:en:Amaterasu|Amaterasu Ōmikami]] – A goddess born from Izanagi’s left eye (though some theories suggest she was originally a male deity<ref>Shōnensha, Gotō Zen, Watanabe Hiroyuki, Hanejōda Masahiko 『神道の本 八百万の神々がつどう秘教的祭祀の世界』 [[Gakken Holdings|Gakken]], pp.56-57.</ref>). She is the [[:en:Solar deity|Solar deity]]. * {{ill|Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|ja|月読命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ツクヨミ}} – A deity born from Izanagi’s right eye. Although the text does not specify gender, he is generally considered a male deity. He governs the night as the [[:en:Lunar deity|Moon god]]. * [[:en:Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo-no-Mikoto]] – A male deity born from Izanagi’s nose. He is the {{ill|Sea deity|ja|海神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sea deity|1=water deity|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1916821}}, ruling over the oceans.
The ''[[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]]'' states in its main text that Izanagi and {{ill|Izanami|ja|伊邪那美|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izanami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to イザナミ|1=Izanami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q682306}} declared, "How can we not give birth to the rulers of the heavens and earth?" and thus they begot four deities, among whom these three are included. Additionally, it notes that after the Moon God but before Susanoo, they also gave birth to {{ill|Hiruko|ja|ヒルコ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruko|1=Hiruko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1067028}}.

These three deities are described in the ''[[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]]''<ref name="Y">[[Tobe Tamio]] 『八百万の神々 日本の神霊たちのプロフィール』 [[Shinkigensha]], p.12.</ref>. The name originates from Izanagi himself proclaiming these deities as the most noble among the gods he had begotten. They are also called the '''Three Noble Gods''' (三貴神, Sankishin)<ref name="Y" />.
* [[:en:Amaterasu|Amaterasu Ōmikami]] – A goddess born from Izanagi’s left eye (though some theories suggest she was originally a male deity<ref>Shōnensha, Gotō Zen, Watanabe Hiroyuki, Hanejōda Masahiko 『神道の本 八百万の神々がつどう秘教的祭祀の世界』 [[Gakken Holdings|Gakken]], pp.56-57.</ref>). She is the [[:en:Solar deity|Solar deity]]. * {{ill|Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|ja|月読命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ツクヨミ}} – A deity born from Izanagi’s right eye. Although the text does not specify gender, he is generally considered a male deity. He governs the night as the [[:en:Lunar deity|Moon god]]. * [[:en:Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo-no-Mikoto]] – A male deity born from Izanagi’s nose. He is the {{ill|Sea deity|ja|海神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sea deity|1=water deity|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1916821}}, ruling over the oceans.
The ''[[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]]'' states in its main text that Izanagi and {{ill|Izanami|ja|伊邪那美|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izanami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to イザナミ|1=Izanami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q682306}} declared, "How can we not give birth to the rulers of the heavens and earth?" and thus they begot four deities, among whom these three are included. Additionally, it notes that after the Moon God but before Susanoo, they also gave birth to {{ill|Hiruko|ja|ヒルコ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruko|1=Hiruko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1067028}}.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Three Noble Children]][[ja:三貴子]][[ko:삼귀자]][[pl:Troje Szlachetnych Dzieci]][[ru:Михасира-но-удзу-но мико]][[vi:Mikiko]][[zh_yue:三貴子]][[zh:三貴子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Three Noble Children]][[ja:三貴子]][[ko:삼귀자]][[pl:Troje Szlachetnych Dzieci]][[ru:Михасира-но-удзу-но мико]][[vi:Mikiko]][[zh_yue:三貴子]][[zh:三貴子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Three Noble Children]][[ja:三貴子]][[ko:삼귀자]][[pl:Troje Szlachetnych Dzieci]][[ru:Михасира-но-удзу-но мико]][[vi:Mikiko]][[zh-yue:三貴子]][[zh:三貴子]] {{Infobox deity|parents={{ill|Izanagi|WD=Q813858}} |associated_deities ={{ill|Amaterasu|WD=Q455602}}; {{ill|Susanoo|WD=Q272993}}; {{ill|Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|WD=Q595520}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[da:d:Q4702904]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:57, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Three Noble Children''' (三貴子, Mihashira no Uzu no Miko, Sankishi) refers to the three deities born last when [[:en:Izanagi|Izanagi]], returning from the [[:en:Yomi|Yomi]], purified himself through a ritual bath (禊, Misogi) to cleanse the impurities of the underworld. These three deities are described in the ''[[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]]''<ref name="Y">[[Tobe Tamio]] 『八百万の神々 日本の神霊たちのプロフィール』 [[Shinkigensha]], p.12.</ref>. The name originates from Izanagi himself proclaiming these deities as the most noble among the gods he had begotten. They are also called the '''Three Noble Gods''' (三貴神, Sankishin)<ref name="Y" />.
* [[:en:Amaterasu|Amaterasu Ōmikami]] – A goddess born from Izanagi’s left eye (though some theories suggest she was originally a male deity<ref>Shōnensha, Gotō Zen, Watanabe Hiroyuki, Hanejōda Masahiko 『神道の本 八百万の神々がつどう秘教的祭祀の世界』 [[Gakken Holdings|Gakken]], pp.56-57.</ref>). She is the [[:en:Solar deity|Solar deity]]. * {{ill|Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|ja|月読命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ツクヨミ}} – A deity born from Izanagi’s right eye. Although the text does not specify gender, he is generally considered a male deity. He governs the night as the [[:en:Lunar deity|Moon god]]. * [[:en:Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo-no-Mikoto]] – A male deity born from Izanagi’s nose. He is the {{ill|Sea deity|ja|海神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sea deity|1=water deity|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1916821}}, ruling over the oceans.
The ''[[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]]'' states in its main text that Izanagi and {{ill|Izanami|ja|伊邪那美|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izanami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to イザナミ|1=Izanami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q682306}} declared, "How can we not give birth to the rulers of the heavens and earth?" and thus they begot four deities, among whom these three are included. Additionally, it notes that after the Moon God but before Susanoo, they also gave birth to {{ill|Hiruko|ja|ヒルコ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruko|1=Hiruko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1067028}}.
== References == {{Reflist}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Three Noble Children]][[ja:三貴子]][[ko:삼귀자]][[pl:Troje Szlachetnych Dzieci]][[ru:Михасира-но-удзу-но мико]][[vi:Mikiko]][[zh_yue:三貴子]][[zh:三貴子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Three Noble Children]][[ja:三貴子]][[ko:삼귀자]][[pl:Troje Szlachetnych Dzieci]][[ru:Михасира-но-удзу-но мико]][[vi:Mikiko]][[zh_yue:三貴子]][[zh:三貴子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Three Noble Children]][[ja:三貴子]][[ko:삼귀자]][[pl:Troje Szlachetnych Dzieci]][[ru:Михасира-но-удзу-но мико]][[vi:Mikiko]][[zh-yue:三貴子]][[zh:三貴子]] {{Infobox deity|parents={{ill|Izanagi|WD=Q813858}} |associated_deities ={{ill|Amaterasu|WD=Q455602}}; {{ill|Susanoo|WD=Q272993}}; {{ill|Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|WD=Q595520}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q4702904]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:57, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Three Noble Children''' (三貴子, Mihashira no Uzu no Miko, Sankishi) refers to the three deities born last when [[:en:Izanagi|Izanagi]], returning from the [[:en:Yomi|Yomi]], purified himself through a ritual bath (禊, Misogi) to cleanse the impurities of the underworld. These three deities are described in the ''[[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]]''<ref name="Y">[[Tobe Tamio]] 『八百万の神々 日本の神霊たちのプロフィール』 [[Shinkigensha]], p.12.</ref>. The name originates from Izanagi himself proclaiming these deities as the most noble among the gods he had begotten. They are also called the '''Three Noble Gods''' (三貴神, Sankishin)<ref name="Y" />.
* [[:en:Amaterasu|Amaterasu Ōmikami]] – A goddess born from Izanagi’s left eye (though some theories suggest she was originally a male deity<ref>Shōnensha, Gotō Zen, Watanabe Hiroyuki, Hanejōda Masahiko 『神道の本 八百万の神々がつどう秘教的祭祀の世界』 [[Gakken Holdings|Gakken]], pp.56-57.</ref>). She is the [[:en:Solar deity|Solar deity]]. * {{ill|Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|ja|月読命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ツクヨミ}} – A deity born from Izanagi’s right eye. Although the text does not specify gender, he is generally considered a male deity. He governs the night as the [[:en:Lunar deity|Moon god]]. * [[:en:Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo-no-Mikoto]] – A male deity born from Izanagi’s nose. He is the {{ill|Sea deity|ja|海神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sea deity|1=water deity|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1916821}}, ruling over the oceans.
The ''[[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]]'' states in its main text that Izanagi and {{ill|Izanami|ja|伊邪那美|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izanami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to イザナミ|1=Izanami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q682306}} declared, "How can we not give birth to the rulers of the heavens and earth?" and thus they begot four deities, among whom these three are included. Additionally, it notes that after the Moon God but before Susanoo, they also gave birth to {{ill|Hiruko|ja|ヒルコ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruko|1=Hiruko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1067028}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Three Noble Children]][[ja:三貴子]][[ko:삼귀자]][[pl:Troje Szlachetnych Dzieci]][[ru:Михасира-но-удзу-но мико]][[vi:Mikiko]][[zh-yue:三貴子]][[zh:三貴子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Three Noble Children]][[ja:三貴子]][[ko:삼귀자]][[pl:Troje Szlachetnych Dzieci]][[ru:Михасира-но-удзу-но мико]][[vi:Mikiko]][[zh-yue:三貴子]][[zh:三貴子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Three Noble Children]][[ja:三貴子]][[ko:삼귀자]][[pl:Troje Szlachetnych Dzieci]][[ru:Михасира-но-удзу-но мико]][[vi:Mikiko]][[zh-yue:三貴子]][[zh:三貴子]] {{Infobox deity|parents={{ill|Izanagi|WD=Q813858}} |associated_deities ={{ill|Amaterasu|WD=Q455602}}; {{ill|Susanoo|WD=Q272993}}; {{ill|Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|WD=Q595520}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q4702904]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:57, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Three Noble Children''' (三貴子, Mihashira no Uzu no Miko, Sankishi) refers to the three deities born last when [[:en:Izanagi|Izanagi]], returning from the [[:en:Yomi|Yomi]], purified himself through a ritual bath (禊, Misogi) to cleanse the impurities of the underworld. These three deities are described in the ''[[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]]''<ref name="Y">[[Tobe Tamio]] 『八百万の神々 日本の神霊たちのプロフィール』 [[Shinkigensha]], p.12.</ref>. The name originates from Izanagi himself proclaiming these deities as the most noble among the gods he had begotten. They are also called the '''Three Noble Gods''' (三貴神, Sankishin)<ref name="Y" />.
* [[:en:Amaterasu|Amaterasu Ōmikami]] – A goddess born from Izanagi’s left eye (though some theories suggest she was originally a male deity<ref>Shōnensha, Gotō Zen, Watanabe Hiroyuki, Hanejōda Masahiko 『神道の本 八百万の神々がつどう秘教的祭祀の世界』 [[Gakken Holdings|Gakken]], pp.56-57.</ref>). She is the [[:en:Solar deity|Solar deity]]. * {{ill|Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|ja|月読命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ツクヨミ}} – A deity born from Izanagi’s right eye. Although the text does not specify gender, he is generally considered a male deity. He governs the night as the [[:en:Lunar deity|Moon god]]. * [[:en:Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo-no-Mikoto]] – A male deity born from Izanagi’s nose. He is the {{ill|Sea deity|ja|海神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sea deity|1=water deity|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1916821}}, ruling over the oceans.
The ''[[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]]'' states in its main text that Izanagi and {{ill|Izanami|ja|伊邪那美|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izanami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to イザナミ|1=Izanami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q682306}} declared, "How can we not give birth to the rulers of the heavens and earth?" and thus they begot four deities, among whom these three are included. Additionally, it notes that after the Moon God but before Susanoo, they also gave birth to {{ill|Hiruko|ja|ヒルコ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruko|1=Hiruko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1067028}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Three Noble Children]][[ja:三貴子]][[ko:삼귀자]][[pl:Troje Szlachetnych Dzieci]][[ru:Михасира-но-удзу-но мико]][[vi:Mikiko]][[zh-yue:三貴子]][[zh:三貴子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Three Noble Children]][[ja:三貴子]][[ko:삼귀자]][[pl:Troje Szlachetnych Dzieci]][[ru:Михасира-но-удзу-но мико]][[vi:Mikiko]][[zh-yue:三貴子]][[zh:三貴子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Three Noble Children]][[ja:三貴子]][[ko:삼귀자]][[pl:Troje Szlachetnych Dzieci]][[ru:Михасира-но-удзу-но мико]][[vi:Mikiko]][[zh-yue:三貴子]][[zh:三貴子]] {{Infobox deity|parents={{ill|Izanagi|WD=Q813858}} |associated_deities ={{ill|Amaterasu|WD=Q455602}}; {{ill|Susanoo|WD=Q272993}}; {{ill|Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|WD=Q595520}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q4702904]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:57, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Three Noble Children''' (三貴子, Mihashira no Uzu no Miko, Sankishi) refers to the three deities born last when {{ill|Izanagi|en|Izanagi|WD=Q813858|lt=Izanagi}}, returning from the {{ill|Yomi|en|Yomi|WD=Q1142558|lt=Yomi}}, purified himself through a ritual bath (禊, Misogi) to cleanse the impurities of the underworld. These three deities are described in the ''{{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki}}''<ref name="Y">[[Tobe Tamio]] 『八百万の神々 日本の神霊たちのプロフィール』 [[Shinkigensha]], p.12.</ref>. The name originates from Izanagi himself proclaiming these deities as the most noble among the gods he had begotten. They are also called the '''Three Noble Gods''' (三貴神, Sankishin)<ref name="Y" />.
* {{ill|Amaterasu|en|Amaterasu|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami}} – A goddess born from Izanagi’s left eye (though some theories suggest she was originally a male deity<ref>Shōnensha, Gotō Zen, Watanabe Hiroyuki, Hanejōda Masahiko 『神道の本 八百万の神々がつどう秘教的祭祀の世界』 [[Gakken Holdings|Gakken]], pp.56-57.</ref>). She is the {{ill|Solar deity|en|Solar deity|WD=Q511056|lt=Solar deity}}. * {{ill|Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|ja|月読命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ツクヨミ}} – A deity born from Izanagi’s right eye. Although the text does not specify gender, he is generally considered a male deity. He governs the night as the {{ill|Lunar deity|en|Lunar deity|WD=Q1569856|lt=Moon god}}. * {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|en|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|WD=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} – A male deity born from Izanagi’s nose. He is the {{ill|Sea deity|ja|海神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sea deity|1=water deity|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1916821}}, ruling over the oceans.
The ''{{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|WD=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki}}'' states in its main text that Izanagi and {{ill|Izanami|ja|伊邪那美|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izanami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to イザナミ|1=Izanami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q682306}} declared, "How can we not give birth to the rulers of the heavens and earth?" and thus they begot four deities, among whom these three are included. Additionally, it notes that after the Moon God but before Susanoo, they also gave birth to {{ill|Hiruko|ja|ヒルコ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruko|1=Hiruko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1067028}}.

These three deities are described in the ''{{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki}}''<ref name="Y">[[Tobe Tamio]] 『八百万の神々 日本の神霊たちのプロフィール』 [[Shinkigensha]], p.12.</ref>. The name originates from Izanagi himself proclaiming these deities as the most noble among the gods he had begotten. They are also called the '''Three Noble Gods''' (三貴神, Sankishin)<ref name="Y" />.
* {{ill|Amaterasu|en|Amaterasu|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami}} – A goddess born from Izanagi’s left eye (though some theories suggest she was originally a male deity<ref>Shōnensha, Gotō Zen, Watanabe Hiroyuki, Hanejōda Masahiko 『神道の本 八百万の神々がつどう秘教的祭祀の世界』 [[Gakken Holdings|Gakken]], pp.56-57.</ref>). She is the {{ill|Solar deity|en|Solar deity|WD=Q511056|lt=Solar deity}}. * {{ill|Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|ja|月読命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ツクヨミ}} – A deity born from Izanagi’s right eye. Although the text does not specify gender, he is generally considered a male deity. He governs the night as the {{ill|Lunar deity|en|Lunar deity|WD=Q1569856|lt=Moon god}}. * {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|en|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|WD=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} – A male deity born from Izanagi’s nose. He is the {{ill|Sea deity|ja|海神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sea deity|1=water deity|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1916821}}, ruling over the oceans.
The ''{{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|WD=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki}}'' states in its main text that Izanagi and {{ill|Izanami|ja|伊邪那美|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izanami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to イザナミ|1=Izanami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q682306}} declared, "How can we not give birth to the rulers of the heavens and earth?" and thus they begot four deities, among whom these three are included. Additionally, it notes that after the Moon God but before Susanoo, they also gave birth to {{ill|Hiruko|ja|ヒルコ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruko|1=Hiruko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1067028}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Three Noble Children]][[ja:三貴子]][[ko:삼귀자]][[pl:Troje Szlachetnych Dzieci]][[ru:Михасира-но-удзу-но мико]][[vi:Mikiko]][[zh-yue:三貴子]][[zh:三貴子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Three Noble Children]][[ja:三貴子]][[ko:삼귀자]][[pl:Troje Szlachetnych Dzieci]][[ru:Михасира-но-удзу-но мико]][[vi:Mikiko]][[zh-yue:三貴子]][[zh:三貴子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Three Noble Children]][[ja:三貴子]][[ko:삼귀자]][[pl:Troje Szlachetnych Dzieci]][[ru:Михасира-но-удзу-но мико]][[vi:Mikiko]][[zh-yue:三貴子]][[zh:三貴子]] {{Infobox deity|parents={{ill|Izanagi|WD=Q813858|1=Izanagi}} |associated_deities ={{ill|Amaterasu|WD=Q455602|1=Amaterasu}}; {{ill|Susanoo|WD=Q272993|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}; {{ill|Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|WD=Q595520|1=Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto}}}} '''Three Noble Children''' (三貴子, Mihashira no Uzu no Miko, Sankishi) refers to the three deities born last when {{ill|Izanagi|en|Izanagi|WD=Q813858|lt=Izanagi|1=Izanagi}}, returning from the {{ill|Yomi|en|Yomi|WD=Q1142558|lt=Yomi|1=Yomi}}, purified himself through a ritual bath (禊, Misogi) to cleanse the impurities of the underworld. These three deities are described in the ''{{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki|1=Kojiki}}''<ref name="Y">[[Tobe Tamio]] 『八百万の神々 日本の神霊たちのプロフィール』 [[Shinkigensha]], p.12.</ref>. The name originates from Izanagi himself proclaiming these deities as the most noble among the gods he had begotten. They are also called the '''Three Noble Gods''' (三貴神, Sankishin)<ref name="Y" />.
* {{ill|Amaterasu|en|Amaterasu|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|1=Amaterasu}} – A goddess born from Izanagi’s left eye (though some theories suggest she was originally a male deity<ref>Shōnensha, Gotō Zen, Watanabe Hiroyuki, Hanejōda Masahiko 『神道の本 八百万の神々がつどう秘教的祭祀の世界』 [[Gakken Holdings|Gakken]], pp.56-57.</ref>). She is the {{ill|Solar deity|en|Solar deity|WD=Q511056|lt=Solar deity|1=Solar deity}}. * {{ill|Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|ja|月読命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ツクヨミ}} – A deity born from Izanagi’s right eye. Although the text does not specify gender, he is generally considered a male deity. He governs the night as the {{ill|Lunar deity|en|Lunar deity|WD=Q1569856|lt=Moon god|1=Lunar deity}}. * {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|en|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|WD=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} – A male deity born from Izanagi’s nose. He is the {{ill|Sea deity|ja|海神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sea deity|1=water deity|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1916821}}, ruling over the oceans.
The ''{{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|WD=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki|1=Nihon Shoki}}'' states in its main text that Izanagi and {{ill|Izanami|ja|伊邪那美|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izanami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to イザナミ|1=Izanami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q682306}} declared, "How can we not give birth to the rulers of the heavens and earth?" and thus they begot four deities, among whom these three are included. Additionally, it notes that after the Moon God but before Susanoo, they also gave birth to {{ill|Hiruko|ja|ヒルコ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruko|1=Hiruko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1067028}}.
